title: Moderation Summary - April 21, 2026
body:
Abuse queue triage completed. Actions taken:

• Banned: spam_wave_42 (phishing links across 6 channels)
• Warned: toxic_runner (targeted harassment of newcomers)
• Closed false positive: core_maintainer report (brigading - no action)

3 high-severity reports processed. Trusted member protections upheld.
